---
agent: browser-extension
description: Style the popup of a browser extension.
---
Create  styles for the popup of a browser extension. The popup should have a clean and modern design. Use a color scheme that is in black and blue. Align fonts. Use a sans-serif font for the text. Add some padding and margins to make the content look more organized. Make sure the buttons have a consistent style and are easy to click.

replace black background with light one. fix buttons positioning - they must be in center
add a border for entire popup and caption 'Practiscore Calendar'
